resultList.dtldesc: A well-positioned 3 BHK apartment in Wave City Eligo, NH 24, Ghaziabad, offering spacious interiors, modern amenities, and a strategic location within a planned township. Ideal for families seeking a ready-to-move home with convenience, connectivity, and lifestyle features.::Property Specifications::This thoughtfully designed apartment offers a super built-up area of 1453 sq. ft, providing ample space for comfortable family living. Situated on the ground floor of an 8-storey building, the home ensures easy accessibility, making it particularly suitable for families with elderly members. The layout includes three bedrooms, three bathrooms, and three balconies, enhancing natural light, ventilation, and openness within the home. The property is semi-furnished, allowing immediate occupancy while still offering flexibility for personal interior preferences. It features a separate living and dining arrangement along with a modular kitchen setup. The apartment is south-facing and designed with a combination of marble and tiled flooring, ensuring durability and a neat finish. Being a ready-to-move unit within a RERA-approved project, it offers both convenience and regulatory assurance.::Facilities::The apartment is part of a well-planned residential complex equipped with modern amenities. Residents benefit from 24-hour water supply, full power backup, and comprehensive security with CCTV surveillance. The building includes lift access and one covered parking space, ensuring convenience for residents. Additional features such as intercom facilities, visitor parking, and landscaped surroundings contribute to a comfortable lifestyle. The presence of a kids’ play area and other community amenities enhances the overall living experience within the society.::Locality::Located on NH 24 in Ghaziabad, within the Wave City township, the property enjoys excellent connectivity and a rapidly developing infrastructure. The area is strategically positioned near ISKCON Temple Sector 5, offering easy accessibility and a recognisable landmark. Essential services such as schools, hospitals, supermarkets, and public transport options are available within a very short distance of approximately 100 metres, ensuring everyday convenience. NH 24 is a major arterial route connecting Ghaziabad to Delhi and other NCR regions, making it a highly desirable residential location for working professionals and families seeking connectivity along with modern township living.
